description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MiNiFi-CPP CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has multiple jobs for different environments including macOS with Xcode 11.2.1 and 12.0, Windows with VS2017 and VS2019, and various Ubuntu and Debian versions. Each job checks out the code, installs dependencies, sets up the environment, and builds the project with different configurations.
